---
name: Research contribution
about: Propose a new experiment, baseline, or manuscript improvement
title: "[RESEARCH] "
labels: research
assignees: []
---

**Type of contribution**
- [ ] New baseline (add to baselines/run_baselines.py)
- [ ] New model version (v15+ from the experiment loop)
- [ ] Manuscript correction (paper/)
- [ ] Notebook improvement (notebook.py)
- [ ] New analysis or table

**Description**
What do you want to add or change?

**Sourced data**
All metrics must come from pocoo.vaked.dev logs or baseline_results.json.
Where does the data for this contribution come from?

**Verification checklist**
- [ ] No fabricated numbers
- [ ] LaTeX environments balanced (if paper/ changed)
- [ ] Python syntax valid (if code changed)
- [ ] No secrets committed

**AI assistance disclosure**
Did you use AI assistance? If so, disclose (e.g., "Drafted with Claude, reviewed and verified by me").
